name: jengo/base
description: Core package of the Jengo framework. Integrates Vite, static Model Facades, robust event triggers, validation form handlers, JSON entities with Sqids obfuscation, dynamic module autoloading, and fluent array/string wrappers.

models.description: Entity representing standard schemas. Provides JsonSerializable control via visible/hidden arrays, and Sqids-based integer ID obfuscation.

properties.visible: array of property names allowed during JSON serialization
properties.hidden: array of property names stripped during JSON serialization
properties.obfuscatedFields: array of integer ID properties (e.g. ['id', 'user_id']) to encode/decode using Sqids

models.usage: class UserEntity extends BaseEntity { protected array $obfuscatedFields = ['id']; protected array $hidden = ['password']; }

facades.description: Allows Laravel-like static querying (where, find, first, etc.) over standard CI4 models.

validation.description: Abstract class to define validation rules, custom messages, handle redirect/JSON responses, and fetch validated data.

methods.validate: validate(?RequestInterface $request = null): bool (clears validation cache and runs validation)
methods.validated: validated(): array (returns only fields matching the defined rules)

validation.description: Controller class or method Attribute targeting pre-dispatch validation handling using a FormHandler.

attributes.description: Controller class or method Attribute that wraps output into a standardized JSON response envelope containing status, message, data, or errors.

events.description: Base event structure. Enforces event name constant (NAME) and handler method.
events.usage:
class OrderCreated extends AbstractEvent { public const NAME = 'order.created'; public static function event(...$args): void { /* handle event */ } }
trigger_event(OrderCreated::class, $order);

libraries.description: Fluent wrapper for string manipulation, slugging, random generators, casing, and search.

modules.description:
Scans root modules/ directory recursively to find Jengo modules containing a Module.php marker, registering their PSR-4 namespaces on the CodeIgniter autoloader dynamically or from cache. 
 You can use the spark command `jengo:make module` to create a new module from the CLI

methods.discoverAndRegister: discoverAndRegister(): void (boots and registers modules namespaces)
methods.discover: discover(): array (gets cached or live scanned list of module namespaces)

helpers.name: form
helpers.description: Retrieves the active/last validated FormHandler instance, or instantiates a new handler.

helpers.name: page
helpers.description: Helper to load page views from Views/pages/ directory.

helpers.name: vite_tags
helpers.description: Outputs Vite entry point development/production script and stylesheet links.

helpers.name: sqids_instance
helpers.description: Returns the shared Sqids instance for encoding/decoding IDs.

helpers.name: sqids_hash
helpers.description: Obfuscates an integer ID using Sqids, returning null if the input is null.

helpers.name: sqids_unhash
helpers.description: Decodes a Sqids hash back to an integer ID, returning null if the input is null/empty or invalid.

commands.name: jengo:make page
commands.description: Generate a new layout or page view.

commands.name: jengo:make repo
commands.description: Generate a repository class mapped to a Model.

commands.name: jengo:make module
commands.description: Generate a new Jengo module structure.

commands.name: jengo:ai discover
commands.description: Compiles Jengo package capabilities for AI coding assistants.

commands.name: jengo:setup
commands.description: Configures views, layouts, pages, and partial folders.

commands.name: jengo optimize
commands.description: Optimize Jengo performance by compiling modules configuration map.
